question.text: A trader expecting INR to appreciate against EUR should:

answer.text: Sell EURINR futures or buy EURINR put options
Buy EURINR futures or buy EURINR call options

explanation.text: **The Logic:** INR appreciation against EUR = EURINR falls. To profit: sell EURINR futures (profit when price falls) or buy EURINR puts (right to sell EUR at a higher price). **The Trap:** Buying EURINR futures would profit from EUR appreciation (INR depreciation), which is the opposite view. **Cross-Exam Context:** Directional trading is tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Always match: Bearish on base currency = Sell futures/Buy puts. Bullish on base currency = Buy futures/Buy calls.
